  6. ####  def clean(closure: AnyRef, checkSerializable: Boolean = true, cleanLevel: ClosureCleanerLevel = [ClosureCleanerLevel.RECURSIVE](<../../../../package.html>)): Unit

[ ](<../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.ClosureCleaner$@clean\(closure:AnyRef,checkSerializable:Boolean,cleanLevel:org.apache.flink.api.common.ExecutionConfig.ClosureCleanerLevel\):Unit> "Permalink")

Clean the given closure in place.

Clean the given closure in place.

More specifically, this renders the given closure serializable as long as it does not explicitly reference unserializable objects.

closure


the closure to clean

checkSerializable


whether to verify that the closure is serializable after cleaning

cleanLevel


whether to clean enclosing closures transitively
